prompt: You need to search for all configuration files across 8 microservice directories at '/tmp/benchmark-sandbox/services/'. The services are: auth/, billing/, catalog/, search/, notify/, analytics/, gateway/, and scheduler/. Each service may have config files in various formats: .env, config.json, config.yaml, or settings.toml. For each service: 1) Search for configuration files. 2) If found, read the file and extract the DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL values. 3) Check if any service references a database or cache that doesn't match the shared infrastructure list at '/tmp/benchmark-sandbox/services/shared/infra.json'. Some services may have no config files at all (newly added services). Generate a report at '/tmp/benchmark-sandbox/reports/config-resolution-report.txt' listing each service, its config files found (or 'none found'), and any misaligned connection strings.
